visual_language: hand-drawn watercolor celestial nightscape with layered cloud forms, swirling linework, star clusters, and whimsical creatures drifting through deep midnight sky
encounter: Artist as stargazer — works float as illuminated vignettes through a scrolling celestial journey, each collection a new constellation or cloudbank to drift through
intent: Evoke serene mystical wonder; collections emerge gently from cloud layers as viewer scrolls downward through the night sky

components.description: Animated SVG star field scattered across the background
Swirling SVG cloud bands between collections
Translucent paper-toned frame with soft cream matting, art centered within
Elegant serif heading on a soft translucent banner drifting across the sky
Small whimsical creature SVGs drifting near collections

layout_engine.description: Full-width sections stacked vertically; artworks in horizontal scroll strips per collection; cloud SVGs and stars layer behind as atmosphere; gentle CSS parallax via transform on scroll
